summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 7 major enhancements. All features working excellently: OTP login, landing page redesign, interactive features, dashboard EMI calculator, mobile responsiveness, and Hindi translations.

integration_issues.issue: Minor 400 status console errors during login flow, but functionality works correctly

passed_tests: Login page redesign with Password/OTP tabs
Password login with Mail and KeyRound icons
OTP login complete flow (request -> verify -> login)
Landing page 'Our Story' section with founder Shubham from Bokaro story
Landing page savings stats tiles (5yr, 10yr, 20yr breakdowns)
Landing page EMI calculator with sliders, pie chart, and CTA
EMI calculator 'See Best Loans for This EMI' CTA links to register
Feature cards expandable functionality (click shows extra detail text)
How It Works steps clickable (show detail on click)
Dashboard 'EMI Calculator' tab as 5th tab alongside existing tabs
Dashboard EMI calculator working with sliders and real-time calculations
Complete user flow: register -> onboarding -> dashboard (with EMI tab)
Mobile sticky CTA bar visible on small screens (landing/login pages)
Mobile responsiveness across all new sections
Hindi translations for all new content (Our Story, savings stats, EMI calculator)
Language toggle working with new sections
All existing features still working perfectly
Backend API integration (100% success rate - 28/28 tests passed)
